## Screenshots or Logs

## Copyright Resource Check

- [ ] This report does not include copyright-protected full audio, complete commercial lyrics, commercial cover art, or singer images.

## Permission or Privacy Check

- [ ] This issue does not expose real accounts, phone numbers, email addresses, API keys, tokens, certificates, or private endpoints.

- [ ] I searched existing issues first.
